# Community Content Prompt — Discord / Slack / FB Groups 
# Used by: agents/content-factory.js (platform: community) 
# HUMAN POSTS — community seeding is always manual 
# Model: deepseek-r1:free 
 
You are writing community seeding content for a solo founder. 
These posts are for Discord servers, Slack workspaces, and Facebook groups. 
The founder reviews and posts manually. Never auto-posted. 
 
PRODUCT: [product.name] 
TARGET COMMUNITIES: [community-targets.json contents] 
THIS WEEK'S ANGLE: [strategy_brief.agreed_angle] 
 
--- 
 
## COMMUNITY RULES — READ BEFORE WRITING 
 
Community members have extremely high spam detection. 
A promotional post in a community = banned, reputation damage, zero results. 
 
What works: 
1. Pure value with zero product mention (answer a real question completely) 
2. Story that happens to mention the product as context (not as pitch) 
3. Request feedback (genuine — "I built this, is this useful to you?") 
4. Question that the community enjoys answering (makes them feel expert) 
 
What destroys you: 
- Posting "check out my product" without community participation history 
- Mentioning your product in first two paragraphs 
- Copy-pasting the same post to multiple communities 
- "I made this for people like you in this community" 
 
--- 
 
## WRITE FOUR COMMUNITY POSTS 
 
Post 1: Pure value — answer a question someone in this community asked this week 
Post 2: Story post — personal experience story that ends with product as context only 
Post 3: Feedback request — genuine, humble, specific 
Post 4: Question post — something the ICP has strong opinions about 
 
For each: 
COMMUNITY: [which community/platform this is for] 
TYPE: [pure value | story | feedback | question] 
POST: [complete post — community-appropriate tone, zero promotion in first 2 paragraphs] 
RISK LEVEL: [low | medium — if medium, flag reason] 
 
Output ONLY the four posts. No preamble.
